case_title: ALEXANDER RABINOVICH VS. CALIFORNIA PACIFIC MEDICAL GROUP, INC ET AL

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF OCT-23-2023 - CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE TO NOV-27-2023 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF ALEXANDER RABINVOVICH DDS APPEARED. THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE PER PLAINTIFF'S REQUEST. PLAINTIFF ALEXANDER RABINOVICH IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT CALIFORNIA PACIFIC MEDICAL GROUP, INC.
